topic: Setting Up and Managing Hostel Data
summary: This topic discusses the necessity of providing structured hostel data, including hostel names, room numbers, and bed divisions, to effectively integrate and manage the hostel module and associated fees within the ERP.
steps: Provide comprehensive hostel data to the ERP team in a specified format.
Include details such as hostel names, specific room numbers, and bed divisions within each room.
The ERP team will use this data to configure and set up the hostel module in the system.
business_rules: Hostel fees can be structured into multiple installments (e.g., four parts).
A security deposit for hostel accommodation is typically a one-time fee.
important_notes: Detailed and structured hostel data (including room and bed specifics) is essential for the proper functioning of the hostel module.
Hostel fees, while separate from tuition fees, often follow similar installment payment patterns.
The ERP team will provide a sample Excel format for submitting hostel data.
questions: What kind of data is required to set up the hostel module in the ERP?
How are hostel fees typically structured and managed in the system?
Can the hostel module manage specific room and bed allocations for students?
